mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND POST_IS_DELETED = 0) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0) AS commentCount, ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN TBL_POST TP ON TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID WHERE TP.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT_LIKE TCL JOIN TBL_COMMENT TC ON TCL.COMMENT_ID = TC.ID WHERE TC.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TC.COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0)) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) AS bookmarkCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_FOLLOW WHERE FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId}) AS followingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_FOLLOW WHERE FOLLOWING_ID = #{userId}) AS followerCount FROM DUAL

SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, TP.POST_TAG AS postTag, TP.POST_READ_COUNT AS postReadCount, TP.POST_CREATE_AT AS postCreateAt, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL WHERE TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID ), 0) AS likeCount FROM TBL_POST TP WHERE TP.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TP.ID DESC

SELECT TP.ID AS id, TP.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, TP.POST_TAG AS postTag, TP.POST_READ_COUNT AS postReadCount, TP.POST_CREATE_AT AS postCreateAt, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL2 WHERE TPL2.POST_ID = TP.ID ), 0) AS likeCount FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN TBL_POST TP ON TPL.POST_ID = TP.ID JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TP.USER_ID = TU.ID WHERE TPL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TPL.ID DESC

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile FROM TBL_FOLLOW TF JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TF.FOLLOWING_ID = TU.ID WHERE TF.FOLLOWER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TF.ID DESC

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile FROM TBL_FOLLOW TF JOIN TBL_USER TU ON TF.FOLLOWER_ID = TU.ID WHERE TF.FOLLOWING_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TF.ID DESC
SELECT USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE DESC

SELECT TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(TEWM.ID)) * 100) AS progress FROM TBL_EDU TE JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID WHERE TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TWS.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE ORDER BY TE.ID ASC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT TU.ID AS id, TU.USER_NAME AS userName, TU.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, TU.USER_INTRO AS userIntro, TU.USER_JOB AS userJob, TU.USER_ADDRESS AS userAddress, TU.USER_EMAIL AS userEmail, TU.USER_PHONE_NUM AS userPhoneNum, TU.USER_EXP AS userExp, TU.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile, TU.USER_CREATE_AT AS userCreateAt, TU.USER_ROLE AS userRole, CASE WHEN TSU.ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS socialUser, TSU.SOCIAL_USER_PROVIDER AS socialMemberProvider FROM TBL_USER TU LEFT JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_USER TSU ON TU.ID = TSU.USER_ID WHERE TU.ID = #{userId}
